title: Orumurai Piranthen Lyrics Nenjirukkum Varai
stanzas:
Orumurai piranthaen
orumurai piranthaen
unakena uyiraiyum
naan koduppaen.

manadhinil unnai
sumappadhinaale
maranaththai thaandi
vaazhndhiruppen

en kannil unai vaithae
kaatchigalai paarpen.
oru nimidam unai marakka
muyandrathile thottren.

neeye en idhayamadi
neeye en jeevanadi.

undhan netri meedhile
thuli varvai varalaagumaa
chinna thaaga neeyumthaan
manam thaangumaa

un kannile thuli neeraiyum
nee sindhavum vidamaatten.
un nizhalaiyum tharai meedhile
nadamaadavum vidamaatten

orey udal orey uyir
orey manam
ninaikkaiyil inikkirathe

neeye en idhayamadi
neeye en jeevanadi.

kaatru veesum maalaiyil
kadarkaraiyil nadai podanum
... paimaram padageri
dhisai maaranum.

oli veesidum iru kangalthaan
vazhi kaattidum kalangaiyaa
karai saeravae manam illaiye
ena thondrinaal adhu pizhaiyaa

nenjukulle unnai vaithu
poottivittu saaviyai
tholaithu vitten.

neeye en idhayamadaa
neeye en jeevanadaa

Orumurai piranthaen
orumurai piranthaen
unakena uyiraiyum
naan koduppaen.

manadhinil unnai
sumappadhinaale
maranaththai thaandi
vaazhndhiruppen

en kannil unai vaithae
kaatchigalai paarpen.
oru nimidam unai marakka
muyandrathile thottren.

neeye en idhayamadaa
neeye en jeevanadaa

seo.title: Orumurai Piranthen Lyrics Nenjirukkum Varai

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song expresses deep emotions of love and devotion, highlighting the willingness to give one's life for a loved one.

What is the context of the song in the movie?

In Nenjirukkum Varai, the song plays during a pivotal moment that emphasizes the characters' emotional connection and commitment to each other.

Who are the singers of this song?

The song features the talented voices of Hariharan and Sadhana Sargam.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for Orumurai Piranthen was composed by Srikanth Deva.

When was the song released?

The song was released on December 15, 2006.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Orumurai Piranthen, the heartfelt lyrics and melodious tune encapsulate the essence of love and sacrifice. The song unfolds during a significant moment in Nenjirukkum Varai, where the protagonists express their deep emotional bond. With its soothing melody and romantic vibe, it evokes feelings of nostalgia and longing. This duet beautifully showcases the chemistry between the singers, making it a memorable piece in Tamil cinema.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Orumurai Piranthen from Nenjirukkum Varai is a mesmerizing duet that beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. With the soulful voices of Hariharan and Sadhana Sargam, this song takes listeners on an emotional journey. The enchanting composition by Srikanth Deva adds a unique charm, making it a must-listen for romantic souls.
stanzaMeanings: I have given my life to you, just as I have given my heart.
In my heart, because of your presence, I live beyond death.
I will see you in my eyes. For a moment, I got lost in forgetting you.
You are my heart, you are my life.
Will the dew fall on your eyes? Will your heart be able to bear this little burden?
You will not let go of the tears in your eyes. You will not let go of your shadow as it walks on the ground.
One body, one life, one heart, all are sweet in my thoughts.
You are my heart, you are my life.
In the breeze, I must walk on the shore... the light must change direction.
The eyes that shine with light will show the way, but if there is no heart, is that a fault?
I kept you in my heart and let go of my life.
You are my heart, you are my life.
I have given my life to you, just as I have given my heart.
In my heart, because of your presence, I live beyond death.
I will see you in my eyes. For a moment, I got lost in forgetting you.
You are my heart, you are my life.
